title: neocheiropteris phyllomanes
intro: Neocheiropteris phyllomanes, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a species of vascular plant that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and prevent infections. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris phyllomanes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various types of skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine.
